site.pageTitle: Al Noor Academy | One Page Overview

hero.name: Al Noor Academy
hero.tagline: A calm, focused learning environment built to help students grow with confidence, consistency, and strong academic support.

sidePanel.label: Why Families Choose This Academy
sidePanel.summary: The academy combines clear teaching, regular follow-up, and a welcoming environment so students can improve step by step without pressure.

cards.title: Focused Teaching
cards.text: Each lesson is designed to make difficult topics easier to understand through direct explanation, guided practice, and revision.

cards.title: Safe Environment
cards.text: Students learn in a respectful setting where discipline, comfort, and confidence are all part of the daily experience.

cards.title: Parent Follow-Up
cards.text: Parents receive regular updates so they can track attendance, progress, and areas that need extra attention.

cards.title: Clear Learning Path
cards.text: Programs are arranged in a structured way so students can move from basics to stronger performance with less confusion.

story.title: Short Brief
paragraphs: Al Noor Academy is a learning center that supports students through organized courses, committed instructors, and close academic follow-up.
The academy is built for students who need a serious but comfortable place to study, revise, and improve their results over time.

items.title: Average Score Improvement
items.text: Average score growth recorded after one full study term with regular attendance.

items.title: Course Completion Rate
items.text: Most students complete their full course path because sessions stay organized and practical.

items.title: Parent Feedback
items.text: Strong parent satisfaction based on communication, discipline, and noticeable progress.

items.title: Teacher to Student Ratio
items.text: Smaller groups help teachers notice weak points earlier and support students more closely.

items.title: Foundations Program
items.description: A structured course for students who need stronger basics before moving into more advanced study.

items.title: Exam Preparation Track
items.description: An intensive track focused on revision strategy, timed practice, and common exam patterns.

items.title: Advanced Mastery Course
items.description: For students aiming at top performance through deeper explanation, problem solving, and detailed feedback.

plans.name: Starter Plan
plans.description: A simple entry option for students who want consistent weekly support.

plans.name: Progress Plan
plans.description: A balanced plan for students who need stronger follow-up and extra revision time.

plans.name: Excellence Plan
plans.description: A more complete subscription with closer support and higher-intensity preparation.

items.title: Reception And Welcome Area
items.caption: A first look at the academy’s calm and organized entrance space.

items.title: Classroom Setting
items.caption: A sample classroom layout prepared for guided instruction and active discussion.

items.title: Student Activity Session
items.caption: A flexible area where students can revise, collaborate, and receive support after class.

items.quote: The explanations were clear, and the regular follow-up helped me stay committed throughout the term.
items.name: Mariam H.

items.quote: The academy created a serious study routine for my son, and we noticed progress in both confidence and scores.
items.name: Parent Review
items.result: Better attendance and stronger exam performance

items.quote: The teachers gave practical feedback after every assessment, which made it easier to fix mistakes quickly.
items.name: Omar K.
items.result: Completed exam prep track with distinction

items.title: Early Registration Discount
items.description: Students who confirm their seat before the new term begins receive a reduced registration fee.

items.title: Sibling Offer
items.description: Families registering more than one student receive a reduced rate on the second subscription.

items.title: Course Bundle Package
items.description: Students joining two linked courses together receive a better total price than separate registration.
